name: odoo-mcp-connector
description: MCP server for Odoo ERP - Claude AI integration

odooUrl.title: Odoo URL
odooUrl.description: The URL of your Odoo instance (e.g. https://mycompany.odoo.com)

odooUser.title: Username
odooUser.description: Odoo username/login (required if API key is not used)

odooPassword.title: Password
odooPassword.description: Odoo password (required if API key is not used)

odooDb.title: Database Name
odooDb.description: Odoo database name (will be auto-detected if not specified)

yoloMode.title: YOLO Mode
yoloMode.description: Bypasses safety checks. Allowed values: off, read, true

tools.name: odoo_search_records
tools.description: Search for records in any Odoo model with domain filters, sorting, and pagination

tools.name: odoo_get_record
tools.description: Get a single record by ID with specific fields

tools.name: odoo_create_record
tools.description: Create a new record in any Odoo model

tools.name: odoo_update_record
tools.description: Update one or more existing records in any Odoo model

tools.name: odoo_delete_record
tools.description: Delete one or more records in any Odoo model

tools.name: odoo_count_records
tools.description: Count records in a model matching domain filters

tools.name: odoo_list_models
tools.description: List all available Odoo model names and descriptions

tools.name: odoo_get_model_fields
tools.description: Get field definitions and types for a specific Odoo model

tools.name: odoo_aggregate_records
tools.description: Perform group by, sum, avg, or count aggregation on Odoo records

tools.name: odoo_post_message
tools.description: Post a message to a record chatter (mail.thread)

tools.name: odoo_log_channel_message
tools.description: Log an inbound/outbound email or WhatsApp message to a lead's chatter

tools.name: odoo_create_lead
tools.description: Create a new CRM lead with automatic type classification and scheduled follow-up activity

tools.name: odoo_search_leads
tools.description: Search CRM leads and opportunities

tools.name: odoo_create_invoice
tools.description: Create a customer invoice with line items

tools.name: odoo_search_invoices
tools.description: Search account invoices/moves

tools.name: odoo_create_purchase_order
tools.description: Create a vendor purchase order with lines

tools.name: odoo_get_stock_levels
tools.description: Get physical stock levels for products

tools.name: odoo_create_expense
tools.description: Create an employee expense report entry

tools.name: odoo_server_info
tools.description: Get server version and connection info

tools.name: odoo_create_draft_bill
tools.description: Create a draft vendor/customer bill (account.move)

tools.name: odoo_post_after_approval
tools.description: Post/validate a draft invoice (change state to posted)

tools.name: odoo_query_partners
tools.description: Search customers/vendors/partners

tools.name: odoo_get_invoices
tools.description: Get invoice by ID with full details

tools.name: odoo_update_crm_lead
tools.description: Update CRM lead stage, team, or assignee

tools.name: odoo_configure_connection
tools.description: Configure Odoo connection parameters at runtime
